title: Norwegian Chuck Roast Delight
description: A hearty, flavorful roast dish from Norway, perfect for a cold evening. The chuck roast is slow-cooked to tender perfection.
instructions: Season the chuck roast with salt, black pepper, and norwegian allspice.
Heat olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Sear the chuck roast until browned on all sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove the roast from the pot and set aside.
Add sliced onion to the pot and cook until caramelized, about 10 minutes.
Add roast carrots to the pot and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Add beef broth to the pot and stir to combine.
Return the chuck roast to the pot, cover with a lid, and transfer to the preheated oven.
Braise the roast for 2 1/2 to 3 hours, or until tender and falling apart.
Remove the pot from the oven and stir in brown sugar.
Let the roast rest for 15 minutes before slicing and serving.
